stemHtml: What is the correct statement regarding Cold Air Drops?

options.a: They can be identified by looking at the upper wind and temperature situation.
options.b: Are best identified by looking the isobars on a surface chart.
options.c: They are represented as a high pressure area aloft (e.g. on the 500 hPa chart).
options.d: A cold air drop may only be recognized on the surface chart as a low pressure area.
